system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_tonghop_chitiet_donhang3","body":"
--DECLARE @donhang nvarchar(200) = 'DQH-227'

CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_TONGHOP_CHITIET_DONHANG3](@donhang nvarchar(200))
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE @DONHANG_CHITIET TABLE
	(
		donhang nvarchar(200),
		masp nvarchar(200),
		mausac nvarchar(50),
		soluong_donhang int
	)

	INSERT INTO @DONHANG_CHITIET (donhang, masp, mausac, soluong_donhang)
	SELECT A.order_number AS donhang, 
		B.item_number AS masp, C.mausac,
		SUM(B.order_qty) AS soluong_donhang
	FROM tr_order A
	INNER JOIN tr_order_detail B ON A.order_number = B.order_number
	INNER JOIN tr_sanpham C ON B.item_number = C.masp
	WHERE B.f_cancelled = 'N' AND A.order_number = @donhang
	GROUP BY A.order_number, B.item_number, C.mausac

	-- ĐỊNH MỨC NGŨ KIM
	SELECT A.donhang, A.masp, B.mavt, C.mota, C.quycach, C.mausac, C.dvt,
		SUM(DISTINCT C.dongia) AS dongia, 
		C.loaitien,
		SUM(DISTINCT A.soluong_donhang) AS soluong_donhang,
		SUM(B.soluong) AS soluong_theobom,
		SUM(B.soluong * A.soluong_donhang) AS soluong,
		SUM(B.soluong * A.soluong_donhang * C.dongia) AS thanhtien
	FROM @DONHANG_CHITIET A
		INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_ngukim B ON A.masp = B.masp
		INNER JOIN tr_material C ON B.mavt = C.mavt
	GROUP BY A.donhang, A.masp, B.mavt, C.mota, C.quycach, C.mausac, C.dvt, C.loaitien

	-- ĐỊNH MỨC ĐÓNG GÓI
	SELECT A.donhang, A.masp, B.madonggoi, C.mota, C.quycach, C.mausac, C.dvt, 
		SUM(DISTINCT C.dongia) AS dongia, 
		C.loaitien,
		SUM(DISTINCT A.soluong_donhang) AS soluong_donhang,
		SUM(B.soluong) AS soluong_theobom,
		SUM(B.soluong * A.soluong_donhang) AS soluong,
		SUM(B.soluong * A.soluong_donhang * C.dongia) AS thanhtien
	FROM @DONHANG_CHITIET A
		INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_donggoi B ON A.masp = B.masp
		INNER JOIN tr_material C ON B.madonggoi = C.mavt
	GROUP BY A.donhang, A.masp, B.madonggoi, C.mota, C.quycach, C.mausac, C.dvt, C.loaitien

	-- ĐỊNH MỨC SƠN
	SELECT B.donhang, B.masp, A.mact, C.mota, C.quycach, C.mausac, C.dvt, 
		SUM(DISTINCT C.dongia) AS dongia, 
		C.loaitien,
		SUM(DISTINCT B.soluong_donhang) AS soluong_donhang,
		SUM(A.soluong) AS soluong_theobom,
		SUM(A.soluong * B.soluong_donhang) AS soluong,
		SUM(A.soluong * B.soluong_donhang * C.dongia) AS thanhtien
	FROM (
		SELECT A.masp, A.mact, SUM(A.soluong * B.metvuong) AS soluong
		FROM tr_dinhmuc_son3 A
			INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_son3_metvuong B ON A.masp = B.masp AND A.matson = B.matson
		GROUP BY A.masp, A.mact
	) A INNER JOIN @DONHANG_CHITIET B ON A.masp = B.masp
		INNER JOIN tr_material C ON A.mact = C.mavt
	GROUP BY B.donhang, B.masp, A.mact, C.mota, C.quycach, C.mausac, C.dvt, C.loaitien

	SELECT A.donhang, A.masp, B.nguyenlieu, 
		SUM(A.soluong_donhang * B.m3_tc) AS sokhoi
	FROM @DONHANG_CHITIET A
		INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_govan B ON A.masp = B.masp
	WHERE ISNULL(B.nguyenlieu, '') NOT IN ('', '0')
	GROUP BY A.donhang, A.masp, B.nguyenlieu

END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son3","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son3_metvuong","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
